suppress.notes: jQuery bundled inside Maven Fluido site skin (build-time reporting only, not a runtime dependency). Triggered by SpotBugs maven plugin rendering reports with maven-fluido-skin.

mchange-commons-java is a transitive dependency of c3p0 (connection pool). It is not directly exposed to untrusted input in OpenMRS. The CVEs relate to deserialization gadgets that require attacker-controlled serialized data on the classpath, which is not applicable to this runtime context. Tracked in TRUNK-6588. Suppress until upstream releases a patched version.
